hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "docs/specs/.*\.md$"; then echo "[HARNESS] Spec changed: $FILE"; cd backend && PYTHONPATH=. uv run python -m scripts.gen_spec_tests 2>/dev/null | tail -3; echo "[HARNESS] AC test stubs auto-generated."; elif echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "backend/app/(api|services|agents|adapters|models|schemas)/.*\.py$"; then echo "[HARNESS] Code changed: $FILE — verify related Spec AC tests."; fi'
